reviewSummary.sourceStrategy: Only official/operator website pages were reviewed. No Google Images, random web, social media, third-party blog/news, generic unrelated outlet, or AI/generated sources were used. No images were downloaded or imported in this task.
reviewSummary.overlayPathConfirmation: No existing hero.webp, gallery1.webp, gallery2.webp, or gallery3.webp target paths are referenced or overwritten; the manifest contains no import entries because all Italy outlets were deferred.
